title: ProvideChargingInformationRequest
description: This type represents charging information sent by a load management system to a presystem.

RejectedChargingRequestInfo.description: This type represents information about charging requests rejected by a load management system.

reason.description: This type represents reason why the charging requests was rejected by the load management system.

VehicleIdentifier.description: This type represents an unique vehicle identifier associated with VDV261.

EvccIdentifier.description: This type represents a mac address of electric vehicle communication controller associated with ISO 15118.

UniqueIdentifier.description: This type represents an unique identifier.

ChargingStationFaultInfo.description: This type represents error information regarding charging stations.

ChargingStationFaultCode.description: This type represents error codes regarding faults at the charging station.

ChargingPointFaultInfo.description: This type represents information regarding a fault at the charging point.

ChargingPointFaultCode.description: This type represents error codes regarding faults at the charging point.

TractionBatteryInfo.description: This type represents information regarding a traction battery.

stateOfHealth.description: Current state-of-health of traction battery in percent [%] regarding specified maximum capacity

stateOfCharge.description: Current state-of-charge of traction battery in percent [%] regarding current maximum capacity

batteryStatus.description: Condensed health status of the traction battery.

H2TankInfo.description: This type represents information regarding a H2 tank.

h2TankStatus.description: Condensed health status of the H2 tank.

VehicleStatusInfo.description: This type represents status information regarding a vehicle.

batteryChargingVoltage.description: Current charging voltage of 12/24V battery in [V]

VehicleFaultInfo.description: This type represents error information regarding vehicles.

VehicleFaultCode.description: This type represents error codes regarding faults at vehicles.

PreconditioningInfo.description: This type represents information regarding preconditioning according to VDV261.

hvBatteryPreconditioningTime.description: Required time in minutes for preconditioning high voltage battery.

hvBatteryChargingEnergy.description: Required energy in [Wh] for charging high voltage battery (including energy for preconditioning purposes).

vehiclePreconditioningTime.description: Required time in minutes for preconditioning of vehicle.

vehiclePreconditioningEnergy.description: Required energy in [Wh] for preconditioning of vehicle.

VehicleInfo.description: This type represents information regarding a vehicle.

ElectricData.description: This type represents electrical values for the current charging process.

chargingVoltage.description: Current charging voltage in [V] (outgoing in direction of vehicle)

ChargingProcessInfo.description: This type represents information regarding a charging process.

deliveredEnergy.description: Delivered energy during charging process in [Wh] (for statistical purposes only)

ChargingPredictionDataStatus.description: This type represents information regarding the status of a charging process forecast.

ChargingPredictionData.description: This type represents information regarding a charging process forecast.

ChargingPredictionDataMinTargetSoc.description: This type represents information regarding a charging process time forecast given a fix minimum state of charge.

requestedMinTargetSoc.description: Requested minimal state-of-charge in [%] that was provided by the presystem to be reached at minimum.

predictedTime.description: Predicted time to reach the minimal state-of-charge.

ChargingPredictionDataMaxTargetSoc.description: This type represents information regarding a charging process time forecast given a fix maximum state of charge.

requestedMaxTargetSoc.description: Predicted maximum state-of-charge in [%] that was provided by the presystem to be reached at maximum.

predictedTime.description: Predicted time to reach the maximum state-of-charge.

ChargingPredictionDataDepartureTime.description: This type represents information regarding a charging process state of charge forecast given a fix departure time.

predictedDepartureTimeSoc.description: State-of-charge in [%] that was predicted by the LMS at the requestedTimeForDeparture provided by the presystem.

requestedTimeForDeparture.description: The requestedTimeForDeparture provided by the presystem.

ChargingProgressPredictionList.description: This type represents a time series for predicting the charging process (internal extrapolation).

ChargingProgressPredictionListEntry.description: This type represents a single prediction data point for the charging process forecast.

predictedSoc.description: Predicted state of charge in percent (0-100).

predictedTime.description: Timestamp when the predicted SoC is expected to be reached.

presentPowerLimit.description: Optional power limit in [kW] currently set by the LMS.

ScheduledChargingProcess.description: This type represents a charging process in the future.

DepotInfo.description: This type represents depot information sent by a load management system to a presystem.

name.description: This type represents name of the depot.

totalPower.description: Actual power in [kW] drawn from the grid
